programs.title: Field of Dreams
programs.desc: Classic fantasy drama film starring Kevin Costner and James Earl Jones, 1989. An Iowan farmer is inspired to turn one of his cornfields into a place where dreams can come true.

programs.title: Formula E Highlights
programs.desc: Hankook Berlin: Action from Round Eight of the season in Berlin.

programs.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programs.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by Bobby Zamora at The Lake of Dreams, aka Grenville. Their mission is to catch a 60lb UK carp in front of the underwater cameras.

programs.title: Coogan's Bluff
programs.desc: Action comedy film starring Clint Eastwood and Lee J Cobb, 1968. An Arizona deputy sheriff is sent to New York City when a prisoner who has escaped custody is arrested there.
